description: Microsoft Excel 2010 is open with a retail sales spreadsheet (sales_report.xlsx). This sheet contains real US monthly retail sales for Clothing and Clothing Accessories Stores (FRED series MRTSSM448USS), with values in millions of dollars. Apply conditional formatting to the 'Revenue' column (column E): cells with values greater than 10000 should have a green fill background, and cells with values less than 5000 should have a red fill background. Save the changes to the file.
